sharedInteractionsView.description: An account that shares interactions with the requesting account, with counts of posts they have rated or discovered in common.

likesInCommon.description: Number of posts both accounts rated 'like'.

dislikesInCommon.description: Number of posts both accounts rated 'dislike'.

discoveriesInCommon.description: Number of posts both accounts have interacted with (seen), regardless of rating. Superset that includes shared likes and dislikes.
